---
title: "test_muninn_endurance.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_muninn_endurance.py"
loc: 46
complexity: 1
logic_score: 4.15
style_score: 3.69
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.63
---

## Intent
The `test_muninn_endurance.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on mock_root, TestMuninnEndurance, test_endurance_limit_termination, test_mission_failure_resilience, test_spoke_persistence_reconstruction. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via mock_root, TestMuninnEndurance, test_endurance_limit_termination, test_mission_failure_resilience, test_spoke_persistence_reconstruction. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [time](file://time)
- [os](file://os)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [src.sentinel.muninn](file://src.sentinel.muninn)
- [src.sentinel.muninn_heart](file://src.sentinel.muninn_heart)

### Exports
- `mock_root`
- `TestMuninnEndurance`
- `test_endurance_limit_termination`
- `test_mission_failure_resilience`
- `test_spoke_persistence_reconstruction`
